headings.usage: All headings (h1-h6). Use '900' for hero stats and '300' for elegant subtitles.

body.usage: Main body text, paragraphs, labels, and UI elements.

mono.usage: Asset IDs, Status Codes, Timestamps, and Technical Data.

theme_strategy.rules: Light mode is default for readability in labs. Dark mode must use 'Slate' grays (#020617), never pure black.

surface_styles.card_standard: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200 rounded-lg
surface_styles.card_interactive: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:border-blue-500/50 hover:shadow-[0_4px_20px_-2px_rgba(37,99,235,0.1)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-lg group

textures.noise_overlay: opacity-[0.03] pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 mix-blend-overlay bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')]

component_mapping.buttons: components/ui/button.jsx (Customize with 'pill' shape or 'sharp' edges based on context)
component_mapping.inputs: components/ui/input.jsx (Add h-11 for better touch targets)
component_mapping.tables: components/ui/table.jsx (Critical for inventory - ensure dense mode is available)

inventory_grid.classes: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6

accessibility.contrast_check: APCA preferred. Text-to-bg ratio must be > 4.5:1 for normal text.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 44px for all interactive elements on mobile.

3d_libraries.description: Due to low latency requirements, avoid WebGL libraries. Use Recharts for data visualization and Framer Motion for UI transitions.

do: Implement a 'Sidebar' layout for the dashboard.
Ensure the Admin Dashboard uses a Dense Grid for maximum data visibility.
Implement 'Transaction Locking' visually (e.g., disable buttons and show spinners during API calls).
Use 'Badge' components for status indicators (Active, Service Requested, etc.).
dont: DO NOT use 'Inter' font for headings. Use 'Chivo'.
DO NOT use native HTML <select> or <input type='date'>. Use Shadcn components.
DO NOT clutter the interface. Use negative space effectively.

universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all).
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
